cad_specification:
from cadquery import Workplane

# Create the ring band as a torus
# Major radius: 8.5mm (distance from center to tube center)
# Minor radius: 1.5mm (tube thickness radius)
ring_band = (Workplane("XY")
    .circle(8.5)  # Create circle at major radius
    .workplane(offset=0, centerOption="CenterOfMass")
    .circle(1.5)  # Create profile circle with minor radius
    .sweep(Workplane("XY").circle(8.5), sweepAlongWires=True)  # Sweep to create torus
)
